title: Configuring the Web Test Environment
text: Configuring the Web Test Environment Uniface provides a default web environment that allows you to test your web applications. This is automatically configured during installation. You can use the following URL in the browser of your choice to run a server page component: http:// ServerName : Port /uniface/wrd/ ComponentName For example: http://localhost:8080/uniface/wrd/MY_DSP Copy Check the urouter_machine and tomcat_port settings in the [install] section of usys.ini if you do not know the machine name and port number used to address the web server, Table 1. Default Test Environment Item Description Uniface Router Server that handles all communication between Uniface client applications and the Uniface Servers that execute the client requests. Uniface Server Server that enables Uniface clients to access remote resources or to execute remote components. The Uniface Router is responsible for all communication between the client and server. For more information, see Uniface Router . Apache Tomcat Web server including a servlet engine. Web Request Dispatcher (WRD) WRD is a servlet that runs in Apache Tomcat. web.xml Configuration file for a web application. It contains the configuration settings for the Uniface servlets (WRD and SRD). urouter.asn Uniface Router assignment file. Among other things, it defines the path to the Uniface Server. wasv.asn Assignment file for the Uniface Server. References in the urouter.asn file. If necessary, in Uniface startup group, click Start Tomcat Service to start the Tomcat Web server. By default, this is automatically started. If you modify the web.xml file, you need to stop and then start WRD for the change to take effect. Tip: The Uniface testing environment uses default style sheets. If you modify these, restart the WRD, and then the Uniface IDE. They will be used in both the IDE and testing environment. Check that the WRD is running by entering the following URL: http://localhost: Port /uniface/wrd/WRD_Version This displays the Uniface Test Middleware Response page, showing the current WRD version information. Figure 1. Uniface Test Middleware Response Page The servlet setting TESTABLE must be True , which it is by default. For more information, see TESTABLE . Related Links Debugging in a Web Environment Debugging in a web environment requires special techniques because there is no Uniface client application to debug. For each HTTP request, Uniface starts an instance of the requested server page, and terminates it after the request is handled. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
